description_long: This is a plush, star-shaped stuffed toy with a textured pink surface and scattered yellow spots. The toy features five arms radiating from a central body, each arm slightly rounded and tapering at the ends. Two large, round eyes with black pupils are positioned on one of the arms, giving the toy a whimsical and friendly appearance. The surface appears soft and slightly bumpy, mimicking the texture of a real starfish. The overall form is low and wide, with a gentle, inviting look suitable for children. The toy's playful color scheme and simple facial features make it appealing and approachable.
description: A pink, star-shaped stuffed toy with yellow spots and large, friendly eyes on one arm. Its soft, textured surface and playful design resemble a cartoon starfish.
description_view_0: The toy is seen from a low angle, highlighting its textured pink surface, yellow spots, and both large eyes on the nearest arm.
description_view_1: This view shows the toy from the side, with only one eye partially visible and the arms extending outward evenly.
description_view_2: The toy is viewed from the opposite side, with the eyes less visible and the star shape and surface texture prominent.
description_view_3: The toy is seen from the front, with one large eye clearly visible on the closest arm and the other eye partially hidden.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is friendly and neutral, with large, round eyes that give a gentle and approachable look. There is no visible mouth or eyebrows.
attribute_pose_or_posture: All five arms are extended outward from the central body, lying flat and evenly spaced. The body is relaxed and spread out.
